Wall-E Subsystems

Core subsystems and modules specific to the Wall-E robot variant.

  • Control System
  • Feedback System
  • Localization

Subsystem Overview

Control System

Motion planning and actuator control for Wall-E’s movement. See Control System for details.

Feedback System

Sensor data processing and state feedback. See Feedback System for details.

Localization

Position estimation and mapping utilities. See Localization for details.

Getting Started

Start with the Control System subsystem to understand motion control, then explore Feedback System for sensor integration and Localization for position tracking.

For Wall-E setup, see Wall-E Robot. For shared platform documentation, see ../../hardware/architecture.
